_comment: Point this at the ORGS where premium_request returns per-model data (your CLI proved org-level works). You can also list enterprises; each is tried independently. GITHUB_TOKEN comes from the environment, never this file.
_exclude_comment: Seat-license SKUs to drop from the general-endpoint fallback so they don't inflate AI-usage spend. Default is Copilot Business + Copilot Enterprise. Override here if your plan exposes other non-usage SKUs.
